reforms.description: The Canadian federal government proposed a budget aimed at significantly reducing unemployment while combating inflation, which included measures such as accelerated depreciation for machinery and equipment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Accelerated depreciation encourages investment in machinery, which can enhance productivity and support economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The budget was presented in February 1973 with various proposals.
reforms.importance_rationale: The budget includes significant measures aimed at stimulating investment and addressing unemployment, which are crucial for economic stability.
reforms.source_quote: Le Gouvernement fédéral a indiqué que son principal objectif était de réduire sensiblement le chômage tout en luttant contre l'inflation.
